steps.title: Use the colon's definition
steps.content: The clause after the colon explains the blank: the source of a claim has no direct bearing on whether the claim is true.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A: Indistinct means unclear, but the source's clarity is not the issue.
  • Choice C: Indisputable means impossible to question, which does not fit.
  • Choice D: Implicit means unstated or suggested, not unrelated to truth.

steps.title: Choose the no-bearing word
steps.content: The needed word means not applicable to the question of whether the claim itself is true. The answer is B.
